title: selinum cerefolium
intro: Selinum cerefolium, also known as Chervil or Garden Chervil, is a member of the parsley family and is a delicate, annual herb native to Europe. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and carminative qualities. The health benefits of Selinum cerefolium include its ability to aid digestion, reduce nausea, and ease symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of Selinum cerefolium often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
